// note: Project-level MCP override. This REPLACES the context7 plugin's MCP server definition so the Context7 API key actually reaches the server (the plugin ships context7 with NO env block). The key is read from ${CONTEXT7_API_KEY} below, which Claude Code expands from your SHELL ENVIRONMENT at launch. TO SET IT: `export CONTEXT7_API_KEY=<key>` in ~/.zshrc (or ~/.bashrc), then restart Claude Code. DO NOT put the key in settings.json `env` — a top-level settings env is NOT passed to MCP subprocesses, so it is silently ignored and Context7 stays on the anonymous tier. SAFE TO COMMIT: this file holds a ${VAR} reference, never the key. Unset key → the ${CONTEXT7_API_KEY:} empty default falls back cleanly to the anonymous tier (free, just lower rate limits).
